commentary_links.hebrew: רַק֩ בְּכׇל־אַוַּ֨ת נַפְשְׁךָ֜ תִּזְבַּ֣ח ׀ וְאָכַלְתָּ֣ בָשָׂ֗ר כְּבִרְכַּ֨ת יְהֹוָ֧ה אֱלֹהֶ֛יךָ אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָֽתַן־לְךָ֖ בְּכׇל־שְׁעָרֶ֑יךָ הַטָּמֵ֤א וְהַטָּהוֹר֙ יֹאכְלֶ֔נּוּ כַּצְּבִ֖י וְכָאַיָּֽל׃
commentary_links.english: But whenever you desire, you may slaughter and eat meat in any of your settlements, according to the blessing that the ETERNAL your God has granted you. The impure and the pure alike may partake of it, as of the gazelle and the deer.igazelle…deer I.e., animals that may be eaten (cf. 14.5; Lev. 11.1ff.), but not sacrificed (Lev. 1.1ff.).
commentary_links.matched_snippet: &star איכא דאמרי תזבח ואכלת אין לך בהן

commentary_links.hebrew: וְאִם־זֶ֥בַח שְׁלָמִ֖ים קׇרְבָּנ֑וֹ אִ֤ם מִן־הַבָּקָר֙ ה֣וּא מַקְרִ֔יב אִם־זָכָר֙ אִם־נְקֵבָ֔ה תָּמִ֥ים יַקְרִיבֶ֖נּוּ לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
commentary_links.english:
If yourayour In this chapter, Heb. 3rd-person references to the offerer are rendered in the 2nd person, in accord with v. 17. offering is a sacrifice of well-beingbsacrifice of well-being In contrast to others “peace offering.” Exact meaning of Heb. shelamim uncertain.—
If you offer of the herd, whether a male or a female, you shall bring before GOD one without blemish.

commentary_links.hebrew: אַךְ־בְּכ֞וֹר אֲשֶׁר־יְבֻכַּ֤ר לַֽיהֹוָה֙ בִּבְהֵמָ֔ה לֹֽא־יַקְדִּ֥ישׁ אִ֖ישׁ אֹת֑וֹ אִם־שׁ֣וֹר אִם־שֶׂ֔ה לַֽיהֹוָ֖ה הֽוּא׃
commentary_links.english: A firstling of animals, however, which—as a firstling—is G<small>OD</small>’s, cannot be consecrated by anybody; whether ox or sheep, it is G<small>OD</small>’s.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: בבהמה וגו לא יקדיש איש אתו אף הני אין מתפיסן לכל זבח שירצה &star תניא

commentary_links.hebrew: בִּשְׁעָרֶ֖יךָ תֹּאכְלֶ֑נּוּ הַטָּמֵ֤א וְהַטָּהוֹר֙ יַחְדָּ֔ו כַּצְּבִ֖י וְכָאַיָּֽל׃
commentary_links.english: Eat it in your settlements, the impure among you no less than the pure, just like the gazelle and the deer.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: שירצה אמר ליה אין מתפיסן מאי טעמא אמר ליה גמר בשעריך בשעריך מבכור
